name: Biggun
description: A hard-hitting Tediore pistol with high damage per shot, heavy recoil, and only fair accuracy. Its slower-than-usual reload can feel clumsy in normal gunplay, but it also makes the thrown reload easier to time and aim. Versions with larger magazines become especially dangerous when used for reload-explosion bursts.
notes: It can drop as a standard world drop from suitable loot sources.
